sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: India-Austria S&T Cooperation Call for Proposals 2026

eligibility.summary: Indian and Austrian faculty/scientists/researchers. Indian PIs must be from recognized academic institutions or R&D organizations.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: India-Finland Joint Innovation Call 2026
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Department of Science and Technology / Technology Development Board

eligibility.summary: Indian and Finnish organizations. Implemented by Technology Development Board (TDB) on behalf of DST.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: India-Netherlands Hydrogen Fellowship Programme

eligibility.summary: Indian researchers and professionals in hydrogen and fuel cell domain for advanced training and collaborative research in the Netherlands.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: DST SCSP STI Hubs for Scheduled Caste Communities
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Call for Proposals under Scheduled Cast Sub Plan SCSP STI Hubs

eligibility.summary: Autonomous bodies under Central/State Governments, registered NGOs with 3+ years experience in STI projects, technical institutions (IITs, NITs, IISERs), Central and State Government S&T organizations, academic and R&D institutions.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: DST Water Technology Cell (WTC) - Open Call
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Water Technology Cell (WTC) under Water Technology Initiative

eligibility.summary: Faculties/scientists in recognized academic institutions, public-funded R&D institutions, state councils in partnership with academic/R&D organizations, state line departments, S&T-based voluntary organizations, DSIR-recognized SIROs. Industry participation required with minimum 10% cash contribution.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: Indo-French Joint Research Call DST-ANR on Applied Mathematics and AI
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Indo-French Joint Research Call by DST-ANR on Applied Mathematics and Artificial Intelligence

eligibility.summary: Indian and French research teams. Each side will allocate up to 1.5 million EUR for joint research and innovation projects. Projects funded for up to 3 years.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Core Research Grant (CRG)

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens holding regular academic/research position in recognized academic institution, national laboratory, or recognized R&D institution. PhD holders. Private institutions with valid UGC/AICTE/PCI approval or DSIR-SIRO recognition eligible. Proposals accepted in biannual cycles (June-July and November-December).

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: SERB POWER Research Grants for Women
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: SERB-POWER (Promoting Opportunities for Women in Exploratory Research) Research Grants

eligibility.summary: Indian women researchers holding regular academic/research position. Level I (up to 60 lakhs): applicants from IITs, IISERs, IISc, NITs, Central Universities, National Labs. Level II (up to 30 lakhs): applicants from State Universities/Colleges and Private Academic Institutions. Mandatory female Co-PI from same institute. PhD guide cannot be Co-PI.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Start-up Research Grant (SRG)

eligibility.summary: Indian citizens with PhD in Science/Engineering or MD/MS/MDS/MVSc. Must hold regular academic/research position. Eligible within 2 years of joining institution. Upper age limit 42 years (relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/physically challenged/women). One-time career grant. 500 grants per year.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: SERB Scientific and Useful Profound Research Advancement (SUPRA)
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: SERB-SUPRA

eligibility.summary: Researchers with conviction to produce disruptive impact across disciplines. Open to Indian academic and research institutions.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: DBT-BIRAC Joint Call on Bio-AI for High Performance Biomanufacturing under BioE3 Policy
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: DBT-BIRAC Joint Call for Proposals on Bio-AI for Fostering High Performance Biomanufacturing under BioE3 Policy
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Department of Biotechnology and Biotechnology Industry Research Assistance Council

eligibility.summary: Companies registered under Companies Act 2013, startups, LLPs, academic institutions, universities, societies, trusts, NGOs, foundations, SIROs. Inter-disciplinary teams led by coordinator with min 4 years remaining employment. Companies/startups require 51% Indian shareholding. Proposals evaluated on rolling basis.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: BIRAC Product Commercialization Program (PCP) Fund

eligibility.summary: Indian startups incorporated within 10 years, with at least 51% Indian shareholding. Technologies at TRL 7 or above. Must demonstrate validated technology and readiness for scale-up and regulatory compliance.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: ICMR Extramural Research Grants - Multiple Calls 2026
sdg_research_opportunities.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

eligibility.summary: Indian scientists in medical institutes, research institutes, universities, colleges, recognized R&D laboratories, government organizations, and NGOs. Multiple active calls: ICMR-DBT-SNSF Indo-Swiss Joint Research (deadline May 5, 2026); EoI for Clinical Care Excellence on NCDs; EoI on obesity interventions; and more.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: TWAS-CSIR Postgraduate Fellowship Programme
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research

eligibility.summary: Foreign scholars from developing countries (excluding India). Must hold Master's degree in science and technology. Maximum age 35 years. Full-time (4 years) or Sandwich (6 months to 3 years) options available. Must be accepted at a CSIR laboratory.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: CSIR-Nehru Science Postdoctoral Research Fellowship Scheme
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research

eligibility.summary: PhD degree holders within 3 years of award. Indian nationals, PIOs, and OCIs eligible. Up to 20% fellowships to foreign nationals. Max age 32 years (relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/PH/women). 100 fellowships per year. Applications accepted year-round; selections twice a year (June and December).

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: UGC Research Grant for In-Service Faculty Members
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Research Grant for In-Service Faculty Members

eligibility.summary: Faculty members in universities/colleges under Section 2(f) of UGC Act with valid NAAC accreditation. Age up to 50 years. Minimum 10 years service left. Must have supervised 5 PhD candidates and completed 2 sponsored research projects. 200 grants per cycle. Tenure: 2 years.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: IndiaAI Innovation Programme / MeitY AI Innovation Funding
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sdg_research_opportunities.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

eligibility.summary: Indian companies registered under Companies Act, academic institutions, research organizations. Applied Research Track (2-5 crore, 24-36 months). Product Development Track (5-10 crore, 18-30 months). 70% funding for academic institutions, 50-60% for private companies.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: MeitY Centres of Excellence for Policy, Law and Technical Research in Cyber Space
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Call for Proposals for Establishing Centres of Excellence for Policy, Law and Technical Research in Cyber Space
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
sdg_research_opportunities.ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology

eligibility.summary: Recognized and accredited law universities/departments in partnership with recognized technical institutions. Up to 3 CoEs may be selected. Annual funding for 5 years. Must become self-sustaining after grant period.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: MNRE Renewable Energy Research and Technology Development Programme
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: RE-RTD Programme / R&D Scheme of MNRE
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
sdg_research_opportunities.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

eligibility.summary: Academic institutions, universities, research institutes, government/non-profit research organizations (up to 100% funding). Private institutes (up to 50%). Startups, entrepreneurs, manufacturing units (up to 50% for technology development). Industry collaboration encouraged.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: National Renewable Energy Fellowship (NREF) and National Renewable Energy Science Fellowship (NRESF)
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
sdg_research_opportunities.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy

eligibility.summary: Indian students and researchers for pursuing higher studies in renewable energy. NREF: MSc, MTech, PhD, JRF, SRF, RA, PDF. NRESF: PhD holders with 10+ years experience - fellowship Rs. 1.2 lakh/month + research grant up to Rs. 15 lakh/annum + contingent grant Rs. 5 lakh/annum for 5 years.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: MoEFCC Environment Research and Development Programme (ERDP)
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Environmental Research and Development Programme (ERDP)
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change
sdg_research_opportunities.ministry: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

eligibility.summary: Academic institutions, universities, national institutes, recognized R&D institutions, reputed NGOs and voluntary bodies, private organizations (must be registered as research institution with DSIR). Total outlay for FY 2021-2026 is Rs. 26.41 crores.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: ISRO RESPOND Programme - Research Grants for Academia
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: RESPOND Basket 2025 / Sponsored Research Programme

eligibility.summary: Faculty members affiliated to academic institutions/autonomous R&D institutions. PI must be below 65 years including project period. Proposals submitted through I-GRASP online portal. Co-PI from ISRO/DOS Centre identified for each topic.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Announcement of Opportunity: Indian Microgravity Experiments - IMEx-2026

eligibility.summary: Principal Investigators affiliated with government-recognized academic institutions, national research laboratories, Indian startups and industry. Laboratory-scale feasibility demonstration first, then potential microgravity validation and flight opportunities.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: DRDO ARMREB Grants-in-Aid for Armament Research
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: ARMREB Grants-in-Aid Scheme

eligibility.summary: Principal Investigators from research institutions, universities, colleges, Indian academic institutions of national importance, national S&T centers, non-profit professional societies, private institutions with R&D facilities.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startups, incorporated less than 2 years ago, Indian promoters holding >51% shares. Up to Rs 20 lakh grant for proof of concept/prototype. Up to Rs 50 lakh debt/convertible debentures for market entry/scaling. Sector-agnostic. Applications accepted year-round.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: WISE Fellowship for PhD (WISE-PhD) under WISE-KIRAN Scheme

eligibility.summary: Unemployed women scientists aged 27-45 years (3 years relaxation for SC/ST/PH) with postgraduate degree in Basic/Applied Sciences. Fellowship Rs. 37,000/month + HRA + Research Grant Rs. 1 lakh/year + overheads. Tenure up to 5 years. Open throughout the year.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: WISE Post-Doctoral Fellowship (WISE-PDF) under WISE-KIRAN Scheme

eligibility.summary: Women with PhD in basic/applied sciences aged 27-60 years. Unemployed women eligible. Fellowship Rs. 67,000/month + HRA + Research Grant Rs. 2 lakh/year + equipment up to Rs. 3 lakh + overheads. Tenure up to 3 years.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: ICSSR Major and Minor Research Projects 2025-26
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Major and Minor Research Projects Scheme
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Indian Council of Social Science Research

eligibility.summary: Indian social science researchers in UGC-recognized universities/colleges. Minor Projects: 12 months, up to Rs. 15 lakh. Major Projects: 24 months, up to Rs. 30 lakh. Annual call cycle with online applications.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: ICSSR-JSPS Joint Call for Research Proposals FY 2026
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: Indian Council of Social Science Research

eligibility.summary: Indian social scientists with full-time faculty position at public-funded university or research institute. Joint Research Projects: up to 2 years, up to Rs. 7 lakh/ fiscal year, max 3 projects. Joint Seminars: up to 1 week, up to Rs. 7 lakh each, max 2 seminars.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Advanced Research Grant (ARG) 2026

eligibility.summary: Principal Investigators with strong credentials. Pre-proposals required first (May 15 - June 10, 2026). Shortlisted candidates invited for full proposals. Maximum Rs. 5 crore for up to 5 years. Proposals above Rs. 1 crore undergo deeper scrutiny.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Ramanujan Fellowship

eligibility.summary: Indian/Indian-origin scientists and engineers working abroad. Monthly stipend Rs. 1,35,000 for 5 years. Annual research grant Rs. 7 lakh + overheads Rs. 60,000/year. Decisions announced twice a year. Open throughout the year.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Youth Co:Lab National Innovation Challenge 2026 - Responsible Consumption
sdg_research_opportunities.organization: UNDP, Atal Innovation Mission (NITI Aayog), Citi Foundation, T-Hub

eligibility.summary: Youth-led startups, businesses and NGOs in India with founders aged 15-29 (extended to 35 for women, PwD, LGBTQIA+, tribal youth, minorities). Focus on responsible consumption aligned with Mission LiFE. Top 6 startups receive seed grants of Rs. 2.2-3.5 lakhs.

sdg_research_opportunities.project_name: ANRF Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant (PM ECRG)
sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: Prime Minister Early Career Research Grant (PM ECRG)

eligibility.summary: Early career researchers. Provides Rs. 60 lakh plus overheads. Open access publications and patent filing supported. Annual call (typically November-December). Empowers early career researchers to initiate independent research.

sdg_research_opportunities.funding_program: ANRF National Postdoctoral Fellowship (N-PDF)

eligibility.summary: Early-career researchers with PhD, MD, or MS degree from recognized institutions. Upper age limit 35 years (5 years relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH/women). Annual call (January-February cycle).

excluded.reason: Deadline passed (April 30, 2025). Awaiting next annual cycle.

excluded.name: DST FIST Call 2025
excluded.reason: Deadline passed. Specific call cycle closed.

excluded.name: ICMR Small Extramural Grants 2026 (ANVESHAN)
excluded.reason: Deadline passed (March 16, 2026). Awaiting next annual cycle.

excluded.name: DBT-BIRAC Product Commercialization Program (PCP) Fund (January 2026 call)
excluded.reason: Deadline passed (March 15, 2026). New PCP Fund call open until Dec 31, 2026 - included in active.

CSIR CEFIPRA Collaborative Scientific Research Programme
UGC Dr. D.S. Kothari Research Grant
excluded.reason: Specific call window closed (October 2022). Awaiting new cycle.

excluded.name: Atal New India Challenge (ANIC)
excluded.reason: Application closed. Awaiting next edition announcement.
